channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15627] conf-sanity: test_103 'Fail to add OST0000 to lustre.lustre'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for paf <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/8f5e4487-0eb6-4d03-a801-d13f9c511b3e

10.240.38.43@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,checksum,flock,user_xattr,lruresize,lazystatfs,nouser_fid2path,verbose,encrypt)
CMD: trevis-22vm2 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"-1\" \"all\" 4
trevis-22vm2: CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-22vm2: CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-22vm2: CMD: trevis-22vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-22vm2: CMD: trevis-22vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-22vm2: trevis-22vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug -1 all 4
CMD: trevis-22vm4 lctl get_param -n timeout
Using TIMEOUT=20
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-22vm2,trevis-22vm3,trevis-22vm4,trevis-22vm5 [ -f /sys/module/mgc/parameters/mgc_requeue_timeout_min ] && echo 1 > /sys/module/mgc/parameters/mgc_requeue_timeout_min; exit 0
CMD: trevis-22vm4 lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0003-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0004-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0005-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0007-osc-ffffa0070db25800.idle_timeout=debug
setting jobstats to procname_uid
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
Setting lustre.sys.jobid_var from disable to procname_uid
CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param lustre.sys.jobid_var='procname_uid'
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
Waiting 90s for 'procname_uid'
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
disable quota as required
CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -P lod.*.mdt_hash=crush
CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_new lustre.pool1
trevis-22vm4: Pool lustre.pool1 created
CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_new lustre.lustre
trevis-22vm4: Warning, pool lustre.lustre not found
CMD: trevis-22vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_add lustre.lustre lustre-OST0000
trevis-22vm4: Pool lustre.lustre not found
trevis-22vm4: pool_add: No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-22vm1: trevis-22vm4: ssh exited with exit code 2
conf-sanity test_103: @@@@@@ FAIL: Fail to add OST0000 to lustre.lustre
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6386:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:7953:test_103_set_pool()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:7992:test_103()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6690:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6737:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6578:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:8032:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-3_86529_1_14_a9f29206-346d-4ff9-aab2-9fbe7252d591//conf-sanity.test_103.*.1646725214.log
CMD: trevis-22vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-22vm2,trevis-22vm3,trevis-22vm4,trevis-22vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-3_86529_1_14_a9f29206-346d-4ff9-aab2-9fbe7252d591//conf-sanity.test_103.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1646725214.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2022-03-07/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-3_86529_1_14_a9f29206-346d-4ff9-aab2-9fbe7252d591//conf-sanity.test_103.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1646725214.log
item.summary: conf-sanity: test_103 'Fail to add OST0000 to lustre.lustre'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
